ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Standard code for the country (e.g., DEU for Germany) */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_data" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the GDP data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the GDP data was recorded */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP value for the country in that year */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita for the country in that year */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual GDP growth rate for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "immigration_data" (
  "immigration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each immigration entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the immigration data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the immigration data was recorded */,
  "immigration" INTEGER /* Immigration number for the country in that year */,
  "emigration" INTEGER /* Emigration number from the country in that year */,
  "net_migration" INTEGER /* Net migration (immigration - emigration) for the country in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("immigration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immigration_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economies" (
  "economy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economy */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the economy belongs to */,
  "economy_name" TEXT /* Name of the economy (e.g., Agriculture, Manufacturing) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the economy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economy sector */,
  "size_of_economy" REAL /* Size of the economy (e.g., in trillions of USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "economy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economy the indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator (e.g., GDP Growth Rate, Inflation Rate) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator (e.g., %) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the indicator (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_economy_id FOREIGN KEY ("economy_id") REFERENCES economies ("economy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator the data point belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data point was recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data point (e.g., World Bank, IMF) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "request_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the data request */,
  "approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved or rejected the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("approver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being shared */,
  "shared_with" INTEGER /* ID of the user the data is being shared with */,
  "shared_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was shared */,
  "sharing_reason" TEXT /* Reason for sharing the data */,
  "sharing_status" TEXT /* Status of the sharing (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_shared_with FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph, map) */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "shared" INTEGER /* Whether the visualization is shared with other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dashboard (e.g., active, draft, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the widget belongs to */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of widget (e.g., chart, graph, map) */,
  "widget_date" TEXT /* Date when the widget was added to the dashboard */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the widget */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the widget */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the widget on the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widget_data" (
  "widget_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget data entry */,
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the widget the data belongs to */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being used in the widget */,
  "widget_data_date" TEXT /* Date when the widget data was updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the widget */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data for the widget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widget_data_widget_id FOREIGN KEY ("widget_id") REFERENCES dashboard_widgets ("widget_id")
)
